rag_rules: AGREE assumptions must be placed in component type scopes when referring to component ports
AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
generic_rules: Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Ensure AGREE expressions align with AADL data types and port directions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use valid AADL component names and port directions in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Boolean domain values converted to integers
